text:
Fred had a dog that couldn't hear, but she was exceptionally clever. One day, while exploring the neighborhood park, the dog discovered a hidden garden. Intrigued, she began scratching at a mossy stone at its entrance, nudging aside earth and petals. Eventually, a small, fragrant flower bud popped open—it was cherry blossoms!

Her tail wagged ecstatically, and she started diving into the bed. Fred couldn't hear her excitement, but soon discovered her new favorite spot. The dog plopped down under a cherry blossom branch, her head drooping against petals. Fred watched from the fence as she began to meditatively nibble, lost in contented silence.

Every evening, Fred returned to the cherry blossom bed to find Daisy there again, each time nibbling just a bit more of a petal. The two old friends grew close. When a cold winter wind threatened the trees, Daisy gracefully swayed, casting a gentle silhouette. Fred curled up at
